_notes: SFTOnly variant for the WebShop rank-32 MLP+attn LoRA SFT eval. Identical to SFTOnly.json except (a) policy block bumped to rank=32 + the 7-target-module list (matching configs/SFTOnly_alfworld_mlpr32.json), and (b) an explicit env block (the base SFTOnly.json relied on the CLI default) so the train-loop dispatch resolves the WebShop adapter unambiguously. Used by ~/.llms/plans/webshop_sft_mlpr32_oracle_baseline.plan.md Phase 4/5 to compute pure SFT eval before R0 of the 3 WebShop SOTA RL configs. Launch via: modal run infra/app_train_loop.py::train_loop_webshop --config /workspace/configs/SFTOnly_webshop_mlpr32.json --n-episodes 0 --eval-episodes 200 --eval-task-id-base 6500 --sft-adapter /vol/checkpoints/sft_webshop_v3_mlpr32_<ts> --gpu-mem-util 0.30.
